title: NullClaw Tool Definitions
description: A collection of executable skills or API integrations available to the agent.

name.description: Unique identifier for the tool. Must be alphanumeric with no spaces.

description.description: High-level explanation of the tool's purpose. The LLM (ZAI) uses this to decide when to invoke the tool.

properties.description: Map of argument names to their individual JSON Schema definitions.

required.description: List of mandatory parameter names that the LLM must provide.

parameters.description: Standard JSON Schema defining the input arguments for the tool.

handler.description: Execution logic for the tool (Network, Shell, or Binary).

headers.description: Key-value pairs for authentication and metadata.

body.description: Payload template using {{mustache}} syntax for parameter injection.

exec.description: The raw shell command string with {{parameter}} placeholders.

path.description: Absolute path to the executable binary.

args.description: List of arguments passed directly to the binary.
